title: Marketplace AI compétences: issue with the installation of the Gmail intégration
excerpt:
Hello, 
Did somebody able to install the new Gmail intégration from the AI compétence Marketplace ? Keep loading forever on my side 
Thanks, 
Guillaume

posts.author: Krunchy (Guillaume Servonnat)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Did somebody able to install the new Gmail intégration from the AI compétence Marketplace ? Keep loading forever on my side

posts.author: drtanvisachar (Dr. Tanvi Sachar- Certified Monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Krunchy This usually happens when the Gmail integration can’t complete the Google authorization.

Quick checks
Allow pop ups for monday.com and Google
Try an incognito window or another browser
Make sure you’re logged into the correct Google account
If you’re on Enterprise, confirm integrations aren’t restricted by admins

If it keeps loading, it’s likely a Marketplace or permissions issue and monday support may need to reset the connection.

Dr. Tanvi Sachar
Monday Certified Partner, Tuesday Wizard

posts.author: Krunchy (Guillaume Servonnat)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for your feedback. Unfortunately none of the propose solution works.

Will have then to contact the Monday.com support.

thanks anyway
